# INNotebookItemType.task

**Case**

A task item type.

## Declaration

```swift
case task
```

## Discussion

Search your app’s tasks and return each one using an [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INTask] object. A task is usually contained within a task list, but may be standalone if your app does not support task lists.

## Enumeration Cases

- **INNotebookItemType.unknown**: An unknown type of item.
- **INNotebookItemType.note**: A note item type.
- **INNotebookItemType.taskList**: A task list item type.
title: INNotebookItemType.task
